query: My chest feels tight every morning before the standup meeting with my manager.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences physiological anxiety symptoms triggered by morning synchronization meetings with their supervisor.

query: I can't stop checking my phone to see if they texted back, it's making me sick.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits hypervigilance and compulsive checking behavior linked to relationship communication anxiety.

query: Staring at the ceiling at 3 AM completely exhausted but my mind won't shut off.
expected_memory_chunk: User suffers from sleep-onset insomnia driven by racing thoughts and cognitive hyperarousal at night.

query: I just snapped at my partner over a dirty dish and now I feel like a terrible person.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences emotional dysregulation and disproportionate irritability followed by intense feelings of guilt.

query: Everything feels foggy today, I can't focus on my lines of code for more than two minutes.
expected_memory_chunk: User reports significant cognitive fatigue, brain fog, and reduced attention span disrupting professional tasks.

query: Whenever the grocery store gets too crowded, I feel like the walls are closing in on me.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences agoraphobic tendencies and claustrophobic panic symptoms in high-density public spaces.

query: I got the promotion but I'm completely terrified they'll realize I have no idea what I'm doing.
expected_memory_chunk: User struggles with severe imposter syndrome and core incompetence fears following career advancement.

query: I skipped going out with my friends again because the thought of socializing feels like a chore.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits social withdrawal and behavioral avoidance patterns due to low social energy.

query: My throat constricts and my palms sweat whenever I have to present my work to the team.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences acute public speaking anxiety manifested through somatic stress responses.

query: I've been drinking four cups of coffee just to get through the afternoon slump, but it makes me jittery.
expected_memory_chunk: User relies heavily on caffeine to counteract chronic exhaustion, inadvertently exacerbating physical anxiety.

query: I feel like I'm carrying a heavy weight on my shoulders all day and nothing brings me joy right now.
expected_memory_chunk: User describes persistent anhedonia and a pervasive sense of emotional heaviness or low mood.

query: I tore up my entire design draft because a tiny detail looked slightly off. It has to be flawless.
expected_memory_chunk: User displays maladaptive perfectionism and extreme self-criticism leading to task destruction.

query: Ever since the layoffs were announced, I wake up sweating thinking I'm going to lose my apartment.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences financial insecurity and existential job security panic affecting sleep quality.

query: I feel completely detached from my body right now, like I'm watching myself from across the room.
expected_memory_chunk: User reports episodes of depersonalization and dissociation during periods of elevated emotional strain.

query: I dropped a single mug today and ended up sobbing on the kitchen floor for an hour.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences an emotional breaking point where minor frustrations trigger intense crying spells.

query: I keep replaying that awkward comment I made during lunch over and over in my head.
expected_memory_chunk: User engages in persistent post-event rumination regarding minor social interactions.

query: Every time my phone rings, my stomach drops because I assume someone has died or gotten hurt.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits catastrophic thinking and a hyperactive threat-appraisal response to ordinary communication triggers.

query: I haven't left my apartment in four days, and cleaning the kitchen feels like climbing Mount Everest.
expected_memory_chunk: User demonstrates severe psychomotor retardation and depressive lethargy impacting basic activities of daily living.

query: I feel completely fine one minute, and the next I'm so angry I want to throw something at the wall.
expected_memory_chunk: User describes rapid mood swings and volatile affect control without a clear immediate external trigger.

query: I'm working 14-hour days but I still feel like I'm falling behind and letting everyone down.
expected_memory_chunk: User displays classic workplace burnout configurations coupled with over-responsibility patterns.

query: When I try to think about the future, all I see is a blank wall. I just don't see things getting better.
expected_memory_chunk: User expresses deep hopelessness and a foreshortened sense of future orientation.

query: My hands start shaking out of nowhere and I feel this sudden, overwhelming sense of impending doom.
expected_memory_chunk: User suffers from spontaneous, un-cued panic attacks accompanied by autonomic nervous system arousal.

query: I've started avoiding driving on the highway entirely because I'm terrified I'll lose control of the car.
expected_memory_chunk: User develops specific situational avoidance behavior driven by intrusive vehicular safety anxieties.

query: I ordered takeout again because looking at the stove and planning a meal makes me want to burst into tears.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences severe decision paralysis and executive dysfunction relative to domestic tasks.

query: I feel like a ghost in my own house; my family is right there but I feel completely isolated from them.
expected_memory_chunk: User reports profound emotional numbness and interpersonal alienation despite proximity to support systems.

query: I notice my jaw is constantly clenched so hard that my teeth and temples ache by midday.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits chronic bruxism and structural somatic tension accumulation as a baseline stress expression.

query: If I don't double-check that the stove is off three times before going to bed, I can't rest.
expected_memory_chunk: User demonstrates checking rituals and compulsive security behaviors to mitigate nocturnal safety doubts.

query: I got a minor piece of critical feedback on my code and immediately wanted to quit my entire job.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits high rejection sensitivity and an all-or-nothing cognitive distortion regarding professional performance.

query: I can't take deep breaths anymore; it feels like my lungs stop halfway and I'm suffocating.
expected_memory_chunk: User presents with shallow clavicular breathing and subjective dyspnea related to perpetual anxiety states.

query: I find myself eating chips and candy all night long even though I'm not actually hungry.
expected_memory_chunk: User utilizes emotional eating and compulsive snacking as an unconscious self-soothing mechanism.

query: I threw out all my old journals because looking at past versions of myself fills me with absolute disgust.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences intense retrospective shame and rejection of their historical identity.

query: Whenever anyone is quiet around me, I automatically assume they are furious with me or planning to leave.
expected_memory_chunk: User projects abandonment fears onto ambient social silences via personalization distortions.

query: I've been waking up at 4 AM every single day and find it impossible to fall back asleep.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits terminal insomnia or early morning awakening patterns common in clinical depressive cycles.

query: My mind goes completely blank during exams or presentations, like someone turned off a switch.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences stress-induced working memory freezing and cognitive blocking under evaluation pressure.

query: I spent three hours arranging the icons on my desktop instead of finishing the presentation due tomorrow.
expected_memory_chunk: User engages in displacement procrastination and avoidant micro-organizing to dodge high-stakes task anxiety.

query: I feel this hot surge of adrenaline dump into my stomach the moment my alarm goes off.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences acute anticipatory cortisol spikes immediately upon waking up.

query: I haven't responded to my mom's texts in a week because explaining how I feel feels too exhausting.
expected_memory_chunk: User demonstrates communication withdrawal due to overwhelming emotional exhaustion.

query: I am terrified of making a mistake in front of the team, so I just stay quiet during all our architecture reviews.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits avoidant behavior in collaborative professional settings due to intense fear of public negative evaluation.

query: I keep picking at the skin around my thumbs until they bleed whenever I'm waiting for feedback.
expected_memory_chunk: User manifests body-focused repetitive behavior as a physical outlet for nervous anticipation.

query: I feel like I'm completely failing as a parent because I don't have enough patience at the end of the day.
expected_memory_chunk: User struggles with parental guilt and cognitive strain linked to diminished emotional bandwidth at night.

query: I keep buying tech gadgets I don't need just to feel a brief spark of excitement for an hour.
expected_memory_chunk: User relies on retail therapy and impulsive purchasing behaviors to temporarily counteract persistent low affect.

query: My stomach is in constant knots and I have zero appetite, food tastes like cardboard right now.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences stress-induced gastrointestinal distress and a total suppression of somatic appetite signals.

query: I can't make decisions anymore—even choosing between two types of soup makes me spiral into anxiety.
expected_memory_chunk: User reports acute abulia and extreme analysis paralysis over minor daily selections.

query: I feel like everyone around me is moving forward with their lives while I am entirely stuck in wet cement.
expected_memory_chunk: User expresses social comparison distress and feelings of absolute stagnation or immobility.

query: I can't stop thinking about what will happen if the market crashes and I lose my life savings.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences obsessive macro-economic anxieties and catastrophic financial projection patterns.

query: I feel an intense urge to run out of the room whenever the discussion turns to long-term planning.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits acute emotional flight responses when confronted with commitment-heavy futures.

query: I notice that I'm holding my breath for long stretches while working at my desk without realizing it.
expected_memory_chunk: User suffers from 'screen apnea' or stress-induced voluntary breath-holding throughout professional shifts.

query: I spent the weekend doing chores and cleaning because sitting still makes me feel incredibly anxious.
expected_memory_chunk: User relies on compulsive hyper-productivity to outrun uncomfortable internal stillness or underlying anxiety.

query: I keep looking at my old college photos and crying because I feel like my best days are permanently behind me.
expected_memory_chunk: User experiences depressive nostalgia and a profound grief concerning their perceived lost youth or vitality.

query: I feel completely overwhelmed by sensory things—loud noises, bright lights, and screens make me want to scream.
expected_memory_chunk: User exhibits acute sensory overload and hyperacusis brought on by a highly taxed nervous system.
